specs.title: cp-000: Page loads and displays existing decks
cp-001: New Presentation button navigates to slidesnew
cp-002: PPTX Import
cp-003: Import Presentation button opens file picker
cp-004: Accepts pptx files up to 50 MB
cp-005: Rejects files over 50 MB with error message
cp-006: Detects password-protected files and shows warning
cp-007: Shows inline import preview with up to 6 slide preview cards
cp-008: Displays import warnings unsupported features etc
cp-009: Confirm Import creates a new deck from the PPTX
cp-010: Close button resets the inline import panel
cp-011: Each deck card shows title generic presentation placeholder slide count
cp-012: Click a deck to open it in the slides editor
cp-013: Text input for presentation topic
cp-014: Topic field is required before advancing
cp-015: 7 audience type options displayed
cp-016: General
cp-017: Conference
cp-018: Thesis Defense
cp-019: Journal Club
cp-020: Classroom
cp-021: Grant Presentation
cp-022: Poster Session
cp-023: Selecting an audience type highlights it
cp-024: Can proceed to next step after selection
cp-025: 8 preset themes displayed with previews
cp-026: Clicking a theme selects it visual highlight
cp-027: Create button submits and generates the deck
cp-028: After creation redirects to the slides editor
cp-029: Initial title slide is created immediately background slide generation only runs
cp-030: Three-panel layout Filmstrip left Canvas center Properties Panel right
cp-031: Speaker Notes bar at the bottom collapsible
cp-032: Canvas rulers toggle onoff
cp-033: Grid overlay toggle onoff
cp-034: Top toolbar with mode controls save status present button
